rationale: Wrap the goal in `assert((ensures) ==> det_equal) by { if ensures { ... } }` to force z3 to instantiate `maybe_ack_packet`, `send_ack`, `valid_ack`, and `option_cpacket_to_set_packet` on both r1 and r2 against the same `self_@`/`pkt@`. Case-split on `should_ack_single_message(pkt@)`; in the `true` branch use `set!{ r.unwrap()@ }.contains(r.unwrap()@)` against `Set::empty()` to derive a contradiction when `r is None`, then chain send_ack's `src`/`dst`/`ack_seqno` pinning (with EndPoint's structural `view`) to align the inner `Seq<u8>` ids and the `CSingleMessage::Ack` payload; the `false` branch dually uses singleton-vs-empty to force `r is None` on both sides. Broadcast `lemma_vec_obeys_view_eq` to bring the `Vec<u8>` view-eq bridge into scope for the final `dst.id`/`src.id` equality.
